title: Sequence Step
description: Schema for a sequencing step within a scope of work. Defines predecessor and successor relationships, hold points, and duration constraints for construction sequencing.

step_id.description: Unique identifier for this sequence step.

sequence_position.description: Ordinal position in the execution sequence.

scope_ref.description: Reference to the parent scope_of_work record.

predecessor_steps.description: References to steps that must complete before this step begins.

successor_steps.description: References to steps that depend on this step's completion.

trade_ref.description: Reference to the trade_responsibility record for this step.

hold_point.description: Whether this step requires inspection or approval before proceeding.
